# LOCMAF golden vectors

<!-- Generated by `locmaf vectors gen`; do not edit by hand. -->

Codec-derived conformance corpus for LOCMAF packaging version `0.3`
(draft commit `6a2439a`). Every file here is regenerated from the
reference codec and byte-pinned by `locmaf vectors check` (run in
CI), so the corpus can never drift from the implementation.

## Regenerating and checking

```sh
locmaf vectors gen [-out dir]   # rewrite the corpus from the codec
locmaf vectors check [dir]      # re-derive and byte-compare against disk
```

Each case lives in its own directory. Within a case, files are named
`gNNN_oNNN`, where `gNNN` is the group index and `oNNN` the object
index within that group.

## Files in each case

| Path | Contents |
| ---- | -------- |
| `manifest.json` | Case metadata and the SHA-256 of every file in the case. |
| `init.mp4` | The CMAF init segment (`ftyp`+`moov`) the objects decode against. |
| `objects/gNNN_oNNN.locmafobj` | One bare LOCMAF Object — exactly the MOQT object payload, unframed. |
| `canonical/gNNN_oNNN.cmfc` | The byte-exact canonical CMAF chunk reconstructed from that object. |
| `effective/gNNN_oNNN.json` | The decoded effective values (sample durations, sizes, flags, CTOs, CENC aux, gen boxes). |
| `file.locmaf` | *(select cases)* The self-framed, self-contained file: vi64 length-prefixed Objects led by an in-band `rawBoxes` init. |

## Cases

14 cases, 38 objects; 1 case emits a self-framed `file.locmaf`.

| Case | Groups | Objects | `file.locmaf` | Description |
| ---- | -----: | ------: | :-----------: | ----------- |
| `uniform` | 1 | 3 |  | audio-like uniform durations and sizes: ID 6 default size, empty steady-state deltas |
| `varying-sizes` | 1 | 3 |  | video-like varying sizes: ID 1 carries n−1 entries, the last derives from P |
| `single-sample` | 1 | 4 |  | one sample per chunk: sizes never on the wire (P authoritative); ID 8 sync flags deleted via ID 27 |
| `negative-ctos` | 1 | 3 |  | B-frame composition offsets: negative CTOs force trun v1; ID 5 zigzag in both contexts |
| `first-sample-flags` | 1 | 3 |  | sync-led chunks: ID 12 emitted, then deleted via ID 27, then re-introduced by delta |
| `per-sample-flags` | 1 | 2 |  | mixed flags neither uniform nor equal-except-first: ID 7 full 32-bit list |
| `list-grow-shrink` | 1 | 3 |  | sample count 2 → 4 → 1 across deltas: list grow (absolute-as-zigzag) and shrink (truncate) |
| `bmdt-reanchor` | 1 | 4 |  | a BMDT discontinuity mid-group re-anchors with a full header |
| `cenc-subsamples` | 1 | 3 |  | cenc-protected chunks: per-sample IVs (ID 9 overwrite) and subsample maps (IDs 11/13/15) |
| `cbcs-omit` | 1 | 2 |  | cbcs constant-IV audio with no per-sample aux info: senc/saiz/saio all omitted |
| `genboxes` | 1 | 2 |  | prft and emsg boxes ride verbatim as genBox elements ahead of full and delta headers |
| `strict-cmf2-pair` | 1 | 1 |  | two decode-equivalent source encodings (per-sample values vs tfhd defaults) yield one canonical object |
| `rawboxes-file` | 1 | 3 | ✓ | the .locmaf file format: a leading rawBoxes Object carries the init in-band, then normal chunks |
| `event-only` | 1 | 2 |  | zero-sample event chunks: emsg genBoxes, full header per chunk, empty mdat |
